message: Highlight of the Day now has a Star
Manual Save Filters is replaced with Auto Save Filters
Favorites Button on the top now properly switches between Favorites and All
Added Changelog Dropdown to Menu for displaying recent updates and changes to the site
Initial release of OSRS Grand Exchange Tracker
Keep the filters-row centered at all times (layout tweak)
Added news feed section to homepage for displaying recent updates and announcements
Hide tax-related stats in modals and charts for tax-exempt items
Added flip sentiment voting (thumbs up/down) to item modals
Added Player Highlights where Players can submit their images of accomplishments
Combined Save and Reset Filters Button
Combined Grid and List view Button
